'''Redda Macrebe''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who served as a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] agent tasked with acquiring supplies. He was the center of a network of agents and had a vast network of contacts. He primarily operated within the [[Trax Tube/Legends|Trax Tube]] space lane systems.

==Biography==
Macrebe was very efficient at his job. When faced with a request that might normally be unattainable, Macrebe could improvise by acquiring various parts that could be used to construct the needed equipment. During a mission in the [[Trax sector/Legends|Trax sector]], he supplied [[Airen Cracken/Legends|Airen Cracken]] with all the necessary equipment to complete the mission.<ref name="Cracken's Rebel Operatives" />
